title: Bending Properties of Fillet Welds
units_note: I_u is the unit second moment of area, taken about a horizontal axis through G, the centroid of the weld group. The plane of the bending couple is normal to the plane of the paper and parallel to the y-axis. All welds are of the same size.
footnote: I_u, unit second moment of area, is taken about a horizontal axis through G, the centroid of the weld group; h is weld size; the plane of the bending couple is normal to the plane of the paper and parallel to the y-axis; all welds are of the same size.

schema.weld_type: integer identifier matching the textbook row number

location_of_G.x_bar_formula: string expression for x-bar, or null if not explicitly given in the table
location_of_G.y_bar_formula: string expression for y-bar, or null if not explicitly given in the table
location_of_G.note: optional note when the centroid location is conveyed graphically rather than by explicit formulas

rows.description: two parallel vertical line welds separated by b
two parallel horizontal line welds of length b separated by d
C-shaped weld with two horizontal legs b and one vertical leg d
U-shaped weld with one horizontal top leg b and two vertical legs d
rectangular closed weld with width b and height d
I-shaped weld with two horizontal legs b and two vertical legs d centered

location_of_G.note: Centroid G is at the center of the circular weld group. The table conveys this graphically rather than with explicit x_bar and y_bar formulas.
